summary: Iteration 111: Tested Training Tab Cleanup (System Consolidation Phase - Part 1). Verified TrainingMatrix is now the single source of truth for training. Fixed critical bug in TrainingDetailDrawer where History tab crashed with 'history.map is not a function' error. All features working correctly after fix.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TrainingDetailDrawer fetchHistory was using response.data instead of response.data.history - backend returns { training_record, history, total_corrections }
Added Array.isArray check before calling history.map to prevent future crashes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Training Tab features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Tab Cleanup complete. TrainingMatrix is now the single source of truth (legacy 'Training Records' card removed from EmployeeProfilePage.js). TrainingDetailDrawer integration working - clicking training title opens drawer with Details/Evidence/History tabs. Fixed History tab crash bug.

training_matrix_visible.details: TrainingMatrix component displays correctly with data-testid='training-matrix'

legacy_training_records_removed.details: No legacy 'Training Records' card found in Training tab - only TrainingMatrix shown

training_items_with_status_badges.details: Training items display with correct status badges (Current, Missing, Blocker, etc.)

drawer_tabs_present.details: TrainingDetailDrawer shows Details, Evidence, History tabs

drawer_details_tab.details: Details tab shows Validity Period, Work Blocking, Completed/Expires dates

drawer_evidence_tab.details: Evidence tab shows Training Certificate with View/Download buttons and verification status

drawer_history_tab.details: History tab displays training audit history (corrections, verifications, uploads)

training_matrix_filters.details: Search, status filter, and 'Blockers only' checkbox all functional

view_upload_buttons.details: View and Upload certificate buttons present in TrainingMatrix Actions column

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: history.map is not a function in TrainingDetailDrawer History tab
bug_fixed.root_cause: fetchHistory was setting history state to response.data instead of response.data.history. Backend returns { training_record, history, total_corrections } object, not array directly.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed setHistory(response.data || []) to setHistory(response.data?.history || []) and added Array.isArray check in render
